sync with origin -- solve the conflict
Synced with origin and resolved the stash-pop conflict in `docs/wiki/_index.md` by keeping the committed version, then fast-forwarded master to origin's tip.
but dude, you didn't commit -- I need git pull to complete
Committed the regenerated wiki cache file so `git pull` completes cleanly; master is now ahead by one local commit.
I thought ~/src/proactive-context now would setup an auto-commit-its-artifacts git-hook -- why didn't that happen?

Explained that the installed hook is a `post-commit` hook, which only fires after a manual commit—not after wiki regeneration or fast-forward merges—so it never triggered during the sync. Offered to patch the proactive-context installer to have the capture routine self-commit or add post-merge/post-rewrite hooks.
